retained_observations.retained_reason: Historical zero-byte run log cleanup now applies safe candidates independently, but five archived logs remain as retention_blockers because their run-artifact fingerprints are missing or do not record the log path.
retained_observations.next_action: Resolve the five fingerprint retention blockers without deleting arbitrary run evidence, then rerun generated-artifact-retention-clean and refresh artifact-freshness.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when historical zero-byte command logs are classified by retention policy and artifact-freshness no longer reports placeholder-log noise.
